headlines.title: Burnham to announce plans for new North Sea oil and gas drilling
headlines.description: Drilling has become a controversial topic for the Labour party after the 2024 manifesto pledged to not issue new licences.

headlines.title: Chris Mason: Labour pins hopes on Burnham reboot as he plans policy blitz
headlines.description: There is belief in the party that the new leader could put Labour back in the political match, political editor Chris Mason writes.

headlines.title: Control, threats, disfiguring surgery: My life inside Jeffrey Epstein's 'cult'
headlines.description: "Anya" gives the BBC a rare account of how sex-criminal financier Epstein lured and abused his “assistants”.

headlines.title: White House backs Argentina team over Falklands banner
headlines.description: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.

headlines.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
headlines.description: Iran has retaliated against US allies in the region, with Kuwait reporting that a power and water plant had been hit.

headlines.title: Second half of summer to bring chances of rain but heatwave threat persists
headlines.description: Forecasts suggest the weather could turn more changeable during late July and August but the risk of heatwaves remains.

headlines.title: Trump questions Kane's 'defensive' role in semi-final loss
headlines.description: US President Donald Trump joins criticism of England's tactics in their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, by questioning Harry Kane's second-half "defensive" role.

headlines.title: 16 viral moments - from Posh Spice's slow reaction to Haaland's bromance
headlines.description: We look at some of the most memorable scenes during the 2026 World Cup that set the internet alight.

headlines.title: Rooney, Hart and Richards row down Hudson River
headlines.description: Wayne Rooney rows down the Hudson River with fellow BBC pundits Joe Hart and Micah Richards.

headlines.title: Lib Dems urge FA and Uefa to withdraw from Fifa
headlines.description: Sir Ed Davey says Gianni Infantino and world football's governing body is "destroying the integrity of the beautiful game".

headlines.title: I took a month of unpaid leave to look after my daughter for the summer holiday
headlines.description: Like many parents, Natalie and her husband had to combine organised childcare and annual leave to cope with the six-week break.

headlines.title: Brad Pitt's children are dropping their dad's surname - here's why I did the same
headlines.description: Hannah had used her mother's maiden name on her social media for years before she legally made the change.

headlines.title: This music offered North Koreans a glimpse of another world
headlines.description: Defectors tell the BBC that despite restrictions, K-pop has cut through in the stifling dictatorship.

headlines.title: Doctors failed to spot my hidden condition for so long I was left permanently disabled
headlines.description: Actor Daneka Etchells is performing in a show which reflects her experiences of "medical gaslighting".

headlines.title: Gracie Abrams captures pain of early adulthood in new album but you're left wanting more
headlines.description: The singer's third album is full of incisive, witty lyrics that are let down by muted production.

headlines.title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
headlines.description: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire conditions.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'The Burn supremacy' and 'Spice up your wife'
headlines.description: Britian's new prime minister Andy Burnham is the main focus of Saturday's papers.

headlines.title: Clacton by-election attracts 34 candidates
headlines.description: The list of people taking on Nigel Farage contains 20 independents and a number of joke candidates.

headlines.title: 'My buyers dropped their offer by £15,000 the day before exchange': Gazundering and how to avoid it

headlines.title: Watch: Helicopters dump water as huge Norway fire destroys homes
headlines.description: The blaze has destroyed more than 100 homes in Drammen and has spread to a nearby forest, authorities say.

headlines.title: Mum was sent photo of dead baby: NHS trust's mortuary failings explained
headlines.description: Donna Ockenden says there were "recurring examples of failure to protect the dignity of the deceased".

headlines.title: Conman targeted the elderly to defraud them out of millions
headlines.description: Victims speak out after Steven Long stole £11.5m from 115 people to fund his lavish lifestyle.

headlines.title: Do declassified files support Trump's election security claims?
headlines.description: BBC Verify has reviewed these documents, although some of them have been heavily redacted.

headlines.title: Indian activist on hunger strike for 20 days forcibly taken to hospital
headlines.description: Cockroach Janta Party founder Abhijeet Dipke has now begun an indefinite fast in Sonam Wangchuk's place.

headlines.title: What this desert city can teach the world about tackling heat deaths
headlines.description: Maricopa County in Arizona has some of the hottest temperatures, but it has reduced the number of heat-related deaths.

headlines.title: The 'ultimate all-round sportsman' - Garfield Sobers could do it all
headlines.description: Sir Garfield Sobers, who has died aged 89, was rightly chosen as one of the leading five cricketers of the 20th century - and will be remembered as arguably the best all-rounder in the history of the game.

headlines.title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
headlines.description: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.

headlines.title: Viking re-enactor prepares to walk 100 miles in Viking clothing
headlines.description: After the lose of his teacher viking re-enactor Ryan has decided to walk 100 miles in Viking clothing in her memory

headlines.title: Bison rams grandfather in Yellowstone Park, knocking him metres into the air
headlines.description: The man and his grandson appeared a safe distance away from the bison before it quickly chased them down.

headlines.title: 'Mind-blowing' ancient bones discovery sparked by family holiday
headlines.description: The "once in a lifetime" discovery in Pembrokeshire could rewrite history, researchers say.

headlines.title: The man who balances bikes, ladders and sheds on his chin

headlines.title: Two-shot penalty 'fires up' Open contender DeChambeau

headlines.title: Argentina like to leave mark on opponents - Laporte
headlines.description: Spain defender Aymeric Laporte claims World Cup final opponents Argentina are a team that "likes to leave a mark on their opponents".

headlines.title: Familiar faces return for men's T20 Blast Finals Day
headlines.description: Northants Steelbacks, reigning champions Somerset, Hampshire Hawks and Notts Outlaws will face off on T20 Blast Finals Day.
